title: M.W. Padmasiri de Silva
contentHtml:
The Psychology of Emotions in Buddhist Perspective: Sir D. B. Jayatilleke Commemoration Lecture, Colombo, 1976, by Dr. Padmasiri de Silva (2007; 19pp./58KB)
In this concise introductory lecture, the author bridges the languages of Buddhism and Western psychology to describe the range and function of human emotional states.
The Spell of Narcissism and the Anatta Doctrine, by M.W. Padmasiri de Silva
(From the anthology: The Three Basic Facts of Existence: III. Egolessness (Anatta), with a preface by Ñanamoli Thera.)
